title: Add stable API documentation links update to release process
body:
Currently, updating stable API documentation links (e.g., stable swagger API links) is handled manually through individual PRs like #27223. This creates extra work and increases the risk of outdated documentation links after releases.

Add a step to the release process that automatically updates or reminds maintainers to update stable API documentation links when cutting a new release.

This suggestion came from feedback on PR #27223.

comments.body:
This pull request changes the version selector in the REST API.
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27295
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
